opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg ulcer is weeping right through the bandages, it smells terrible, and the throbbing pain gets worse when I stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last two days the wound has started leaking a lot more thick smelly fluid and the pain has become sharp and throbbing, so bad I can't sleep.

symptom_narrative.onset: the sore itself has been there about 3 months; the sudden worsening started roughly 48 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: chronic wound with a new acute flare over the past 2 days
symptom_narrative.character: the old ache was dull and eased with rest; now it's a sharp, throbbing pain, and the wound is soaking the dressings with thick smelly yellow fluid
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the throbbing is severe and keeps me awake; the smell is embarrassing and constant
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on the inner side of my right ankle, over the ankle bone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, worse when I stand or let the leg hang down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: raising the leg up on a footstool takes the edge off the throbbing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up or walking makes the throbbing much worse and the leg feels heavy
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the skin right around the sore has gone red and feels hot, and the ankle is a bit puffy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this ulcer come and go for months but it's never smelt this bad or hurt like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm getting around but only just — the leg is heavy and painful and I've barely slept

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing problems with the veins in my legs; the skin on the lower leg has gone brown and hard over the years
past_medical_history.how_managed: I'm supposed to wear compression stockings

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about coping and about the leg getting worse; embarrassed by the smell

objective_data_offered.value: on video the sore over the inner ankle looks bigger and wetter than usual, with thick yellow discharge soaking through the bandage and a shiny appearance to the wound bed
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view only; wound depth, undermining and the base cannot be properly assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: the skin for about 2-3 cm around the sore has gone red and tender and feels hot to touch compared with the other leg
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-assessment of redness/warmth; extent and margin cannot be objectively measured over chat

objective_data_offered.value: the ankle looks a bit puffy and the skin lower down is brown and hardened
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: chronic skin changes plus mild swelling by eye only; not measured

objective_data_offered.value: I haven't got a thermometer but I don't feel feverish or shivery
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-assessment without a device; low-grade fever cannot be excluded on report alone
